basics.name: Harish Kumar S
basics.title: AI/ML Engineer
basics.location: Ranipet, Tamil Nadu, India | Chennai, India
basics.summary: Integrated MTech in Data Science (VIT, 2025) AI/ML engineer building production systems at FactEntry Data Solutions (A SIX Company). Shipped the Data Mining Engine on K3s with GitLab CI, Argo CD GitOps, Redis queue workers, and FastAPI microservices. Also delivered RAG document systems, PyPI-published NLP tooling, Roboflow computer-vision models, and containerised AI deployments.
highlights: Production K3s bond-extraction platform (80+ CPU cores, Redis streams, human-in-the-loop validation)
GitOps: GitLab CI → Helm promote → Argo CD sync to stage
RAG & document intelligence: FAISS, Groq LLaMA, Streamlit/FastAPI
PyPI package: language-processing-tool | Roboflow YOLOv11 dental CV models

experience.company: FactEntry Data Solutions - A SIX Company
highlights: Shipped Data Mining Engine (DME) modules on K3s stage: corporate/municipal bond extraction, validation UI, and cluster operations portal.
Implemented Redis-stream job dispatch with multi-node worker throughput and GitOps delivery (GitLab CI image build → Helm chart promote → Argo CD).
Built FastAPI microservices, live WebSocket job telemetry, role-based CPU tiering, and domain-restricted enterprise auth.

experience.company: FactEntry Data Solutions - A SIX Company
highlights: Published language-processing-tool on PyPI (PDF language detection, OCR, document clustering).
Built Fixed Income Expert RAG system (FAISS, Groq LLaMA 3, Streamlit/FastAPI) for bond document Q&A.
Developed MedBot medical PDF RAG prototype with SBERT embeddings and grounded LLM responses.
Contributed to backend integration, API workflows, and production-oriented software development practices.
